name: Sustainability Assessment (EDGE/LEED)
description: End-to-end EDGE/LEED indicative assessment: read the model context, resolve the climate-zone baseline, run the energy + water + materials dashboard, then produce the EDGE export and the life-cycle cost benefit. Re-runnable; the dashboard forces a fresh model read and the export/LCC reuse it.

steps.name: Read project context from the model
steps._notes: Populates the sustainability setup (building use, floor area, occupancy, climate site) from ProjectInformation + Spaces/Rooms so the assessment runs off real model context, not blank defaults.

steps.name: Resolve + stamp the climate-zone baseline
steps._notes: Resolves the EDGE/LEED base case by climate zone (never country) + building use and stamps the SUS_* baseline intensities + achieved level onto ProjectInformation.

steps.name: Run the sustainability dashboard
steps._notes: Runs the four estimators (energy / water / materials / schemes), records an EDGE KPI snapshot, and pushes results to the panel. Forces a fresh model read; later steps reuse this pass.

steps.name: Export the EDGE workbook
steps._notes: Writes the EDGE submission workbook (energy / water / materials savings vs baseline) in the project's units.

steps.name: Life-cycle cost benefit
steps._notes: Feeds the per-measure capex + lifetime saving into the BOQ Cost Manager / DD Cost Estimate so sustainability targets land in the budget.

_postNotes: Indicative figures only — EDGE owns the certified number. Enter the EDGE app's official % on the dashboard to drive the determined level.
Set the climate site id and/or climate zone in Setup before running for a defensible baseline; hot/tropical sites differ materially from the temperate default.
